_meta.doc: Internal / dev-facing build metadata. Sibling to data/version.json which holds PUBLIC build-stamp + corpus counts. This file holds CI plumbing fields that don't belong in the public version surface (which the runtime app + README parse). Created 2026-05-14 per IMP-002.

ci_notes: 84 invariants total as of 2026-05-14 audit pass. JA-81 added this release (boilerplate-leak guard). New file kanji_scope_rules.json documents the single-source-of-truth surface map. JA-34 schema updated to handle late_n5 as array-of-objects with per-pattern attribution and deferred_to_n4 as new field.
